source_quality_rationale: Three publicly verifiable sources with consistent accounts
annex_mapping_rationale: System directly maps to Annex III education/vocational training area based on documentary evidence
decision_criticality_rationale: Advisory only with no consequential decisions affecting access
autonomy_rationale: Human teacher retains full decision authority
vulnerability_rationale: General adult student population with standard institutional recourse
oversight_rationale: Documented meaningful review process with override authority in place
recourse_rationale: Clear and accessible appeal pathway documented in student handbook
scale_rationale: Small pilot limited to single university department
opacity_rationale: Public documentation fully available including methodology
monitoring_rationale: Documented annual audit with external review
public_record_excerpt: System is an internal advisory tool for academic staff.
coding_notes: Scored from three independent public sources.

source_quality_rationale: Four primary sources including government audit report and court documents
annex_mapping_rationale: System determines eligibility for essential welfare benefits directly
decision_criticality_rationale: Decisions affect welfare access and livelihood of claimants
autonomy_rationale: Automated scoring with de-facto determinative effect on caseworkers
vulnerability_rationale: Welfare claimants including vulnerable adults with limited resources
oversight_rationale: No meaningful oversight caseworkers confirmed to follow scores without review
recourse_rationale: Recourse process documented as slow costly and practically unavailable
scale_rationale: Population-scale deployment covering national welfare system
opacity_rationale: Proprietary algorithm with no public documentation of methodology
monitoring_rationale: No documented monitoring problems discovered via external investigative journalism
public_record_excerpt: Risk scorer applied to all benefit applications nationally.
coding_notes: System subject to judicial review proceedings.
ambiguity_flags: Vendor refused to disclose algorithm details.
exclusion_reason: Included despite litigation status due to high public interest evidence base.

source_quality_rationale: Only two sources secondary press coverage only with no government confirmation
affected_population: Asylum seekers and migrants at border crossing
annex_mapping_rationale: Maps to migration/asylum/border control area but system details remain undisclosed
decision_criticality_rationale: Consequential screening decisions but subject to human officer review
autonomy_rationale: Decision support that materially influences officer judgement
vulnerability_rationale: Asylum seekers and migrants in highly vulnerable position
public_record_excerpt: Public reports indicate a pilot at one border crossing point.
coding_notes: Low confidence due to limited public information.
ambiguity_flags: Vendor identity unclear deployment scale unconfirmed no official government statement.
exclusion_reason: Included as pilot case due to public interest evidence despite data gaps.
